description: Comparison cases for Foundry web_search path vs direct web_search. Templates support {topic}, {since_date}, {days_window}.

cases.name: baseline_top5
cases.prompt_template: Search the web for updates about {topic}. Return exactly 5 bullets. Each bullet must include title, source URL, and date.

cases.name: recent_window_enforced
cases.prompt_template: Find updates about {topic} published on or after {since_date} (last {days_window} days). Return exactly 5 bullets with title, source URL, and date. If date cannot be verified, explicitly write 'date_unverified'.

cases.name: breaking_news_focus
cases.prompt_template: For topic {topic}, prioritize time-sensitive developments from the last {days_window} days only. Return a JSON array with exactly 5 objects and keys: title,url,date,why_relevant.

cases.name: cve_recent_disclosures
cases.prompt_template: Find newly disclosed CVEs in the last {days_window} days related to {topic}. Return exactly 5 bullets. Each bullet must include: CVE ID, disclosure/publication date, affected product, source URL. If no CVE is found, say 'no_recent_cve_found' and provide 2 authoritative source URLs checked.
